name: feedTweaks
title: Feed Tweaks
description: Tweaks for how posts are displayed

fixPostGaps.name: Vertical gap fix
fixPostGaps.tooltip: Fixes the lack of vertical post spacing on narrow displays

autoBreakpoint.name: Automatic masonry breakpoint
autoBreakpoint.tooltip: Automatically switches from masonry to single-column on narrow displays

expandedMasonry.title: Expanded masonry columns
expandedMasonry.tooltip: Sets the max number of masonry columns
